translations.en: the killing of the son of the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him and his family). So he said: My father narrated to me from his father. He said: When death came upon Mu'awiya, he called his son Yazid (may Allah curse him) and sat him before him, and said to him: 'O my son! I have subdued the difficult necks for you, consolidated the lands for you, and made the kingdom and all it contains your provision. I fear for you from three persons who will oppose you with full effort: 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. al-Khattab, 'Abdullah b. al-Zubayr, and al-Husayn b. 'Ali. As for 'Abdullah b. 'Umar, he is with you, so hold fast to him and do not leave him. As for 'Abdullah b. al-Zubayr, cut him to pieces if you overcome him, for he crouches before you as a lion crouches before its prey, and deceives you as a fox deceives a dog. As for al-Husayn, you know his standing with the Messenger of Allah — he is from the flesh and blood of the Messenger of Allah. I know with certainty that the people of Iraq will summon him to themselves, then betray him and abandon him. If you overcome him, acknowledge his right and his station with the Messenger of Allah. Do not punish him for his actions. We also have ties of blood and kinship with him. Beware of harming him or showing him anything displeasing.'
